raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is sitting on top of box_1 and its left and right sides are accessible; there is sufficient lateral clearance for both end-effectors to establish opposing contacts without colliding with box_1 or the table.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted slightly so it no longer blocks the top face of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (clear area to the right of box_1)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is held stably; a clear placement region on the tabletop to the right of box_1 is available and large enough (at least 30x30 cm) to support the box without overhang.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is placed on the table to the right of box_1 and released, leaving the top of box_1 accessible."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The top of box_1 is unblocked; its left, right, and front faces are accessible; there is enough space around the sides for both arms to form a stable bilateral grasp without contacting box_2 or the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (the darker box) is securely lifted off the table and under full control of both end-effectors."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is sitting on top of box_1 and its left and right sides are accessible; there is sufficient lateral clearance for both end-effectors to establish opposing contacts without colliding with box_1 or the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted slightly so it no longer blocks the top face of box_1.

parsed_json.Target: table (clear area to the right of box_1)
parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is held stably; a clear placement region on the tabletop to the right of box_1 is available and large enough (at least 30x30 cm) to support the box without overhang.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is placed on the table to the right of box_1 and released, leaving the top of box_1 accessible.

parsed_json.Precondition: The top of box_1 is unblocked; its left, right, and front faces are accessible; there is enough space around the sides for both arms to form a stable bilateral grasp without contacting box_2 or the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (the darker box) is securely lifted off the table and under full control of both end-effectors.
